event_comments:
Lost and Found: There were a lot of items left over from the meet today, including a pair of glasses, a few jackets, some mittens, and a few other things. If you think you lost an item, email info@cascadeoc.org and we’ll try to re-unite you with your items.
“Missing Punch” / MSP results: We had two control boxes malfunction during the event. Box 113 on HS Varsity, Short Advanced, and Long Advanced, and box 114 on Intermediate and HS JV Female. If you missed only this control, then your result is considered valid, and the results below reflect this edit. Any results marked “msp” below missed a control other than 113 or 114.
Kudos to those of you who punched your map. Always be sure the control box matches the number you’re looking for, and that it beeps when you insert your e-punch. If it does not beep, find the plastic pin punch hanging with the flag and punch your map to prove you visited the location. (Today we are giving everyone credit even if you didn’t know to use the pin punch, but this may not always be the case!)
About the Route: Want to chat about your course? What routes did you take? What worked? What didn’t? Learn from your fellow orienteers in our new post-event Zoom chat called About the Route, which is from 8-9pm on Sundays following Winter League events. Go here for more information.
